title: Evangelion Emil Chronicle online
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Emil Chronicle online             Quote Post by z23 » Sat Aug 21, 2010 8:25 am i just uncovered this while emptying my cupboard [url]http://blog.lhyeung.net/lang/en-uk/2006/07/20/evangelion-joins-an-mmorpg/[/url] i have the Asuka version still sealed was just wondering if anyone has more details on it etc or whats it worth or is it rare or anything? Thought about putting it on ebay as i doubt i'll ever play it.

[]:             Quote Post by Riotgear » Sun Aug 22, 2010 5:01 am Thanks for the link, interesting. I have a (Japanese) pamphlet from Gamers that has a little on this stuff. There must have been a way to get more Eva stuff outside of what's mentioned in your link because the pamphlet shows a character wearing Shinji's plugsuit and a berserk Eva-01 head (also a devil tail, haha).

Article: Evangelion Emil Chronicle online
[]: Evangelion Emil Chronicle online             Quote Post by z23 » Sat Aug 21, 2010 8:25 am i just uncovered this while emptying my cupboard [url]http://blog.lhyeung.net/lang/en-uk/2006/07/20/evangelion-joins-an-mmorpg/[/url] i have the Asuka version still sealed was just wondering if anyone has more details on it etc or whats it worth or is it rare or anything? []:             Quote Post by Riotgear » Sun Aug 22, 2010 5:01 am Thanks for the link, interesting. I have a (Japanese) pamphlet from Gamers that has a little on this stuff. There must have been a way to get more Eva stuff outside of what's mentioned in your link because the pamphlet shows a character wearing Shinji's plugsuit and a berserk Eva-01 head (also a devil tail, haha).
